name: Williamsburg Turkey Soup - Sl~ 11/90
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the turkey carcass and water in a large Dutch oven. Bring to a boil.
2. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 1 hour. Remove the carcass from the broth and pick the meat off the bones. Set the broth and meat aside.
3. Measure the broth; add water if necessary to measure 3 quarts total.
4. Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes (the roux will be very light in color).
5. Stir in the onion, carrot, and celery, and cook over medium heat for an additional 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add the broth, turkey meat, rice, salt, and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil.
7. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
8. Stir in the half-and-half and cook until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 4 1/2 quarts
